summary: Combat enhancements testing complete. All new features verified: 1) CreatureAbilityCard displays abilities on enemy cards with clickable dice buttons, 2) NPCCombatRecruiter allows adding creatures mid-combat, 3) Token generation API creates AI tokens. Previous fixes (combat end navigation, dice roller 999 max) still working.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user stress_test_1772651200@test.com, campaign 1e6a6d0d-ad88-4b8a-9cc5-a1672119343c, and existing Shadow Wolf Hunt scenario with abilities
context_for_next_testing_agent: Combat enhancement features tested successfully. New constants added to helpers.ts: TEST_ABILITIES_SCENARIO_ID (Shadow Wolf Hunt), TEST_CUSTOM_CREATURE_ID. Token generation API works and returns base64 PNG images. CreatureAbilityCard parses abilities text and creates clickable buttons with dice notation (e.g., 'Bite 1d8+3'). NPCCombatRecruiter has tabs for NPCs and Creatures with search functionality.

creature_ability_cards.description: Enemy cards in combat show X Abilities collapsed section. Expanding shows clickable buttons with dice notation. Clicking rolls dice and shows damage total.

npc_combat_recruiter.description: Green button 'Add NPCs/Creatures to Combat' opens panel with NPCs and Creatures tabs. Search filters results. Adding creature creates new combatant with rolled initiative.

token_generation_api.description: POST /api/ai/generate-token creates AI-generated token images. Requires auth, stores in DB, returns base64 PNG.

dice_roller_large_counts.description: Dice roller accepts 1-999 dice, stress tested with 50, 100+ dice rolls
